user_prompt: Across user-001's watch history, find the most common pair of co-occurring genres (genres that appear together on the same title). Once you have the dominant pair, recommend one catalog title that matches that exact pair (both genres) which user-001 has not already seen.
expected_outcome: Counts every (genre, genre) pair across the user's watched titles, picks the top pair, finds an unseen title that has both genres, justifies with catalog facts. Pair counting across multi-label genre lists is awkward in prose; run_python makes it routine.
